name: DCB Event Store
postCreateCommand: sudo service postgresql start && sudo sed -i 's/peer/trust/g; s/md5/trust/g' /etc/postgresql/*/main/pg_hba.conf && sudo service postgresql restart && createdb -U postgres dcb_event_store_test && bundle lock --add-platform ruby && bundle install && PGUSER=postgres bundle exec ruby -e "require 'pg'; require_relative 'lib/dcb_event_store'; conn = PG.connect(dbname: 'dcb_event_store_test'); DcbEventStore::Schema.create!(conn)"
